title: calciphila galgalensis
intro_study: According to "Phytotherapy research : PTR", calciphila galgalensis has immunostimulatory properties, as its extracts exhibited significant immunostimulatory activities and increased the production of anti-inflammatory interleukin-10 (IL-10).
side_effects: Calciphila galgalensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and vomiting due to its high concentration of toxic alkaloids. Prolonged use of the plant's extract can also lead to kidney damage, heart palpitations, and an increased risk of seizures in sensitive individuals. In extreme cases, improper use of Calciphila galgalensis may cause respiratory failure, coma, or even death. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using the plant for health benefits to avoid these potential side effects.
